title: 14-Page Franchise Prospectus Design
desc: I’m looking for a designer-writer team that can turn our agriculture franchise story into a polished, 14-page prospectus aimed squarely at attracting new franchisees. We already have a full set of branding guidelines—logo usage, colour palette, fonts, image style—so every spread should stay on brand while still feeling fresh and impactful. Scope of work • Structure and layout the complete 14-page document, balancing copy, imagery and white space so it reads smoothly both on-screen and in print. • Craft or refine persuasive copy that highlights our market opportunity, support systems, training programme and projected returns—everything a potential franchisee needs to say “yes”. • Develop clear infographics and tables for key numbers and timelines. • Supply final files as press-ready PDF plus an editable source file (InDesign or Illustrator preferred). Acceptance criteria • Design adheres 100 % to the supplied brand guidelines. • All text is error-free, investor-friendly and targeted to prospects with no prior agriculture background. • Visuals remain crisp when printed at A4 and when viewed on tablets. • Delivery of both final and editable files within the agreed timeframe. I’ll provide the raw content outline, brand assets and high-resolution photos the moment we kick off. Let me

title: Convert AI Images to Print-Ready Vectors for Large-Format Trade Show Display
desc: We are seeking an experienced graphic designer and Adobe Illustrator expert to recreate AI-generated raster images into clean, highly optimized vector artwork. These vectors will be printed on a large-format Graffiti Backlit Trade Show Display for an upcoming software convention. Because of the size and the backlit material, the files must be perfectly engineered for print—standard "auto-tracing" will not work. Key Responsibilities: Vector Tracing: Manually redraw or intelligently trace the provided AI images to create scalable vectors. Node Optimization: Aggressively manage and simplify anchor points to ensure clean paths. We cannot accept files with millions of nodes that will crash printing RIP software. Print Prep: Set the document color profile to CMYK and adjust the palette so the colors print accurately on a backlit fabric display. Template Formatting: Apply the finalized vector art to our manufacturer's exact print template, ensuring all safe zones and bleed lines are strictly followed. Required Deliverables: Fully editable source files (.AI). Production-ready, high-resolution PDF for professional printing. Scalable EPS and SVG formats. Ideal Candidate Profile: Must have verifiable experience preparing files for professional printing and large-format design (trade show bo

title: Custom 10x10 & 10x15 Canopy Design
desc: I need two print-ready layout templates for my pop-up canopies—one for a 10 x 10 ft frame and another for a 10 x 15 ft frame. I already have a logo and want it worked seamlessly into both sizes, keeping proportions and visibility consistent from every angle (roof, valances, and any sidewalls). Please use a vector format (AI, EPS or layered PDF) set to the correct bleed and safe-zone specs most printers request, and include a simple 3-D mock-up so I can visualise the finished tents before sending them to production. Deliverables • Two separate, print-ready files: 10 x 10 ft and 10 x 15 ft • High-resolution mock-ups from at least two viewpoints • All fonts converted to outlines and colours set in CMYK I’ll supply the logo files once we start. Let me know if you also need exact fabric templates from my manufacturer or additional brand elements, and please share a couple of canopy or large-format designs you’ve done so I can see your style aligns with mine.

title: Format 20-Page Illustrated Kindle
desc: I have written a 20-page book and gathered the artwork, but right now everything lives in a chain of emails—each message holds its slice of text and the matching illustration. I need those loose pieces turned into a single, polished Kindle file that Amazon will accept without complaint. Here is what you will work with • Twenty sets of text + high-resolution images delivered via email threads (I will forward or share in a folder). • A simple page-by-page outline so you know exactly which picture pairs with which text. What I expect at hand-off • A fully formatted, illustration-rich file ready for Kindle Direct Publishing (EPUB or KPF—whichever you prefer to achieve the best result). • Consistent page breaks, margins, and image sizing so the layout looks great on Fire tablets as well as the Kindle app. • A quick screen-capture or Kindle Previewer report that proves the file passes Amazon’s checks. Logistics • Turnaround: one week from the day you receive all assets. • Fixed fee: the price we agree on upfront is final; please bid only if that works for you. I’m happy to answer technical questions fast so you can stay on schedule. Looking forward to seeing the book come to life.

Page Structure & Layout Front Cover • Imagery: Full-page "hero" image with Massey Harpers company logo. • Text: Catalogue name prominently at the top; the Year positioned at the bottom with secondary

title: Need data reviewed and graph created
desc: Hello! My name is Shane! I run a small roadside business wherein I help passenger cars and semi trucks needing emergency tire roadside work. I use Google ads to market my business and I want someone to create a bar graph showing me income in one bar and ad spend in the other bar. From the data, I am trying to see if our ad spend is profitable for emergency tire work and by how much. I used to run a vehicle maintenance business (washing, oil changes, etc) and photography business. I am closing these businesses and focusing fully on tires. So I will need any data related to non-emergency services opted out. For example, on the Google ads marketing, there is an ad for mobile detailing that I want this data opted out. However, all the other ad campaign data is related to my emergency tire work. Income related to emergency roadside work: Additional Service Additional Time (Commercial) Additional Time (Passenger) Disposal Parts Roadside Assistance Tire(s) Valve Stem Mileage You want to ignore stuff like: Weekend Service Saturday Oil Service - Gasoline Full Full Detail Wash Anything oil change related Anything wash or detailing related Anything photography related Thank you! Shane

title: PowerPoint Presentation Redesign & Visual Learning Experience

The goal is to start with one infographic/banner. If the first one goes well, I’d like to continue with several more in the same general style. I will provide: - High-resolution transparent PNG product images - Brand color scheme - Font family information - Website context and intended image size Please only apply if you have examples of similar product graphics, website banners, or infographic-style layouts. Include these relevant samples in your proposal. Thank you, Joseph

title: (EASY JOB) Packaging design
desc: I'm working on a premium cyperus rotundus oil (a botanical serum for reducing the appearance of unwanted hair) and I'd like to base the bottle label on the Flos reference I've attached. I love its layout — the benefit + target line up top with the small script 'for', the ingredient line, the short description, and the brand at the bottom. I want to keep that exact structure and just swap in my copy. Here's the copy, mapped to the Flos positions: Top line (Flos's 'CALMING SERUM for SENSITIVE SKIN'): replace with "SMOOTHING SERUM for unwanted hair" — keep the small script 'for' ligature between the two halves Ingredient line (Flos's 'PEONY EXTRACT + LAVENDER'): replace with "POWERED BY CYPERUS ROTUNDUS" Description (Flos's body copy): Reduces the appearance of unwanted hair over time. Soothes & moisturizes after hair removal. Brand (Flos's 'flos' position, at the bottom): I'll provide a custom logo — please leave this placed for it and I'll send the file. Volume (bottom corners): 60 mL · 2 fl oz This is very easy and straightforward job. The design is already complete only the copy needs changing. Will pay more for faster turn around times

desc: A skincare brand is looking for a Graphic Designer / Art Director with a strong eye for modern beauty aesthetics, luxury branding and social-first campaign design. We are NOT looking for corporate branding designers, logo designers or generic marketing creatives. We are looking for someone who genuinely understands: * skincare and beauty visual culture * modern luxury aesthetics * clean typography * editorial composition * feminine minimalism * viral beauty campaigns * trendy Gen Z and Millennial beauty branding * premium social media design Your work will include: * Instagram posts & stories * launch campaigns * website banners * email campaign graphics * META Ads designs * TikTok-friendly beauty creatives * moodboards and visual concepts Requirements: * Strong portfolio with BEAUTY / SKINCARE / COSMETICS work * Understanding of modern beauty trends * Strong typography and layout skills * Ability to create premium-looking visuals * Attention to detail and aesthetic consistency * Ability to follow art direction while bringing fresh ideas BIG PLUS if you: * love skincare/cosmetics * follow beauty brands and trends * understand luxury feminine aesthetics * create trendy social-first designs * have experience with beauty campaigns IMPORTANT: Please do NOT apply with generic branding

title: Haircare Line Packaging Design
desc: **Job Opportunity: Packaging Designer for Haircare Line** We are on the lookout for a skilled designer to develop unified packaging for our haircare products. The perfect candidate will possess a background in packaging design and a deep comprehension of branding principles. Mut have experience in the Luxury/Prestige Beauty Category. Key Responsibilities: - Design labels, bottles, and caps that reflect our brand's essence. - Ensure a cohesive and visually striking aesthetic across all product packaging. - Collaborate with our marketing team to align design with brand strategy. If you have a passion for design and want to contribute to a dynamic haircare line, we would love to hear from you!

title: Label & Packaging Designer Needed for Premium Modern Skincare Brand
desc: Label & Packaging Designer Needed for Premium Modern Skincare Brand We are looking for a talented label and packaging designer to help develop the visual direction for a new skincare and everyday skin-health brand. The brand is a modern, formula-first skincare brand focused on clean, science-backed, everyday skin solutions. The visual identity should feel premium, minimal, refined, and quietly luxurious, while still feeling fresh and relevant for today’s skincare market. Our audience includes Millennials, Gen-Z, and Gen-Alpha-influenced younger consumers. So the design should not feel too traditional, too millennial, too playful, or too trend-heavy. It needs to sit in a balanced space: modern enough for younger audiences, mature enough for premium skincare buyers, and clean enough to build long-term brand trust. This is not a typical “clinical pharmacy” product, and it should not look like a disinfectant, medical spray, or generic cosmetic item. The goal is to create packaging that feels like a premium skincare product: clean, refined, current, trustworthy, and visually memorable. What We Need We need help designing labels and packaging concepts for our first product line, starting with a face and body mist product. The design should work well on a clean spray bottle with premium

title: Label & Packaging Designer Needed for Premium Omega 3 Supplement
desc: Looking for a creative packaging designer to create a premium label and packaging design for an Omega 3 supplement product. The goal is to design packaging that feels clean, trustworthy, modern, and high-end while still standing out in the health and wellness market. The product should visually communicate quality, purity, and premium ingredients. The ideal designer should have experience with supplement, wellness, skincare, or health product packaging and understand how to balance branding, product information, and shelf appeal. The work may include: Bottle label design Packaging box design Typography and layout styling Supplement facts/info organization Visual branding direction Mockup presentations for packaging

title: Label Redesign for Cosmetic Item
desc: We are seeking a skilled designer to create a new label for our cosmetic product. The ideal candidate will have experience in label design and a strong understanding of cosmetic packaging. The project involves redesigning an existing label to enhance its appeal and ensure it aligns with our brand identity. Attention to detail and creativity are essential for this role.

title: Luxurious FMCG Packaging Design
desc: I am looking for a creative packaging and branding designer to develop a professional B2B product sampling hamper for my company. About Us We are a manufacturing company supplying products across multiple categories including: Tea & Coffee Premixes Spices & Seasonings Home Care Products Personal Care / Cosmetics The hamper will be used as a business development and sales tool and will be sent to hotels, restaurants, cafes, caterers, distributors, and potential private-label clients. Scope of Work I need: Complete hamper concept and structure design. Outer box design (premium and professional appearance). Internal product arrangement/layout. Product information cards/catalogue inserts. Branding elements and visual identity. QR code placement for digital catalogue and website. Design suitable for manufacturing in India. Print-ready files and source files (AI/PSD/CDR). Design Requirements Premium, modern, and corporate look. Must appeal to business owners and procurement managers. Should communicate quality, trust, and manufacturing capability. Not a gift hamper; it should feel like a professional sampling and partnership kit. Cost-efficient and practical for shipping and distribution. Deliverables 3D mockups/renders. Box dimensions and specifications. Print-ready artwork. Editable

title: Luxury Brochure Design for Medical Spa
desc: I’m looking for a talented designer to create a luxury brochure for my medical spa. The brochure should be 8 pages long, including the cover, and should effectively communicate the luxury and professionalism of our services. The design should be modern, clean, and sophisticated, with a focus on showcasing our treatments and facilities. The final deliverable should be print-ready. Because we offer many services, I’m looking for concise, high-impact content that avoids feeling overcrowded, overly medical, or sterile. Previous brochures have been too wordy, so I want this piece to be visually appealing, easy to read, and attention-grabbing. Please use our website and social media as inspiration to create a cohesive design that aligns with our brand and overall aesthetic.

title: Minimalist Storefront Window Design (Frosted Glass) for a Hair Salon
desc: Description: I am looking for a skilled print/graphic designer to create a minimal, elegant, and clean storefront window design for my mother's hair salon. I have recently created a website for the salon: www.kadernictviapero.cz. Please review it to get a feel for the brand. However, do not feel strictly limited by it—I am very open to your creative vision! Project Details & Dimensions: -Top window: 207.5 cm (Width) x 78.5 cm (Height) -Bottom window (largest panel): 207.5 cm (Width) x 107.5 cm (Height) -Opening hours panel: 64.5 cm (Width) x Height to be confirmed. (Important: There is a gold curtain directly behind this specific glass panel, so the design and text here need to contrast well against a gold background). Text & Content to Include (Font to use: Benne): Main Window (Bottom panel): Main Logo (Vector file will be provided) Main service: Kadeřnictví (Note: This means Hairdresser in Czech) Sub-text: Dámské & Pánské (Note: This means Women's & Men's. You can use a line "|", a dot "•", or an "&" to separate them elegantly) Opening Hours Panel: Please prepare a basic, elegant layout for opening hours. I will provide the exact text/times during the revision process. Style & Color Theme: Minimalist, elegant, and clean. Colors: A combination of Black and White, with subtle acc

title: Modern Food & Cosmetic Brochure
desc: I need a sleek, modern brochure for our flexible packaging company. The brochure should focus on providing detailed product information, specifically highlighting our food and cosmetic packaging solutions. Key Requirements: - Emphasize product information on food and cosmetic packaging - Modern and sleek design - Professional layout and high-quality visuals Ideal Skills and Experience: - Brochure design expertise - Experience in packaging and product information presentation - Strong graphic design skills for a modern aesthetic - Ability to create a layout that is both informative and visually appealing Please provide samples of previous work.

title: Package Design for Baby Products
desc: I need someone to help me create package designs for baby skin care products. The ideal candidate will have experience in packaging design and be able to create visually appealing and functional designs. The project involves designing packaging that is both attractive and suitable for baby products, ensuring safety and appeal to parents. The designer should be able to work independently and deliver high-quality designs within the specified timeframe.

title: Package Design for Children's Shampoo/Soap Product
desc: We are looking for an experienced packaging designer to create a fun, clean, and playful package/label design for a new children's bath foam product. Examples of a similar product: https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0CCGXJX8P https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0DRFQ4XDQ Requirements: Experience designing packaging/labels for children's products Ability to create a retail-ready, eye-catching design Strong understanding of color, typography, and kid-friendly branding Project Details: Packaging/label design for a children's bath foam product We will provide product information, dimensions, and branding direction Timeline: 2 weeks Compensation: Fixed price or hourly (open to either) To apply, please: Share your relevant packaging design portfolio. Send your top 3 favorite package designs you've created. Briefly explain your experience with children's products or consumer packaged goods (CPG).

title: Packaging & Product Designer for Acne Patch Brand (Gen Z + Clinical Positioning)
desc: Job Description: We are launching a new acne patch brand and are looking for a high-level packaging and product designer who understands both beauty branding and consumer psychology—not just aesthetics. This is not a generic design task. We need someone who can help us build a clear, differentiated product identity in a crowded skincare category. ⸻ 🎯 Project Scope We need design support for: 1. Packaging Design * Outer box (retail + e-commerce) * Inner tray / patch layout (visual guidance) * Possibly resealable pouch direction 2. Product Design Input * Acne patch visual direction * Shape strategy (functional vs expressive) * Color recommendations (invisible vs visible) * Not manufacturing—just design direction ⸻ 🧠 Brand Context We are deciding between two directions: Option A: Clinical / Performance * Focus: effectiveness, overnight repair * Competitors: Hero Cosmetics, COSRX * Style: minimal, clean, premium Option B: Expressive / Gen Z * Focus: self-expression, visible patches * Competitor: Starface * Style: bold, playful, iconic 👉 We are NOT looking for a mix. 👉 Part of your role is to help us clarify and execute one direction properly. ⸻ 🚨 Important: What we DO NOT want * Generic K-beauty style packaging (model face, cluttered claims) * Overdesigned or trendy-for-the-sake-of-i

title: Packaging Designer Needed - Supplement Box + Bottle Label
desc: Hi! I'm looking for a talented packaging designer to create the artwork for my new supplement product. This is a small, well-defined project to start - with the potential for many more if we work well together. What I need: - Outer box design (dieline-ready) - Bottle label design What you'll receive from me: - Exact dimensions and dielines from the manufacturer - All copy/text that needs to appear on the packaging - Full brand guidelines: logo, colors, fonts What I'm looking for: - Strong packaging design portfolio (supplements, cosmetics, or CPG a big plus) - Ability to be creative within our brand guidelines - I want your eye, not just execution - Print-ready files (AI/PDF with proper bleed, CMYK, etc.) - Fast turnaround - I'd like the first concepts as fast as possible Why this could be a great fit long-term: I run an e-commerce brand with an active product pipeline. If the work is great and you're easy to collaborate with, I have a steady stream of packaging and design work coming up. To apply, please share: 1. Examples of packaging you've designed (links or images) 2. Your timeline estimate for box + label 3. Your fixed price for this project Looking forward to seeing your work!
